name: product-switch-api

scripts.package: pnpm buildcheck:all && pnpm type-check:all && pnpm lint:all && pnpm check-formatting:all && pnpm test:all && pnpm build && cd target && zip -qr product-switch-api.zip ./*.js.map ./*.js
scripts.buildcheck:all: pnpm --filter aws buildcheck && pnpm --filter logger buildcheck && pnpm --filter email buildcheck && pnpm --filter guardian-subscription buildcheck && pnpm --filter product-catalog buildcheck && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog buildcheck && pnpm --filter zuora buildcheck && pnpm --filter internationalisation buildcheck && pnpm --filter promotions buildcheck && pnpm --filter routing buildcheck && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data buildcheck && pnpm --filter product-switch-api buildcheck && pnpm buildcheck
scripts.type-check:all: pnpm --filter aws type-check && pnpm --filter logger type-check && pnpm --filter email type-check && pnpm --filter guardian-subscription type-check && pnpm --filter product-catalog type-check && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog type-check && pnpm --filter zuora type-check && pnpm --filter internationalisation type-check && pnpm --filter promotions type-check && pnpm --filter routing type-check && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data type-check && pnpm --filter product-switch-api type-check && pnpm type-check
scripts.lint:all: pnpm --filter aws lint && pnpm --filter logger lint && pnpm --filter email lint && pnpm --filter guardian-subscription lint && pnpm --filter product-catalog lint && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog lint && pnpm --filter zuora lint && pnpm --filter internationalisation lint && pnpm --filter promotions lint && pnpm --filter routing lint && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data lint && pnpm --filter product-switch-api lint && pnpm lint
scripts.check-formatting:all: pnpm --filter aws check-formatting && pnpm --filter logger check-formatting && pnpm --filter email check-formatting && pnpm --filter guardian-subscription check-formatting && pnpm --filter product-catalog check-formatting && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog check-formatting && pnpm --filter zuora check-formatting && pnpm --filter internationalisation check-formatting && pnpm --filter promotions check-formatting && pnpm --filter routing check-formatting && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data check-formatting && pnpm --filter product-switch-api check-formatting && pnpm check-formatting
scripts.test:all: pnpm --filter aws test && pnpm --filter logger test && pnpm --filter email test && pnpm --filter guardian-subscription test && pnpm --filter product-catalog test && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog test && pnpm --filter zuora test && pnpm --filter internationalisation test && pnpm --filter promotions test && pnpm --filter routing test && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data test && pnpm --filter product-switch-api test && pnpm test

NOTICE1: MANAGED FILE: to push changes see buildcheck/README.md - template: buildcheck/data/templates/handler/package.json.ts
NOTICE2: all dependencies are defined in buildcheck/data/build.ts
